title: Ahkeratmehilaiset/waggledance-swarm
summary: Local-first AI runtime that routes 10k+ solver descriptors at warm p99 0.05 ms (1000/1000 hits, zero fallback) and spawns 1004 live agent clones in 120 s. Hex-mesh routing, MAGMA-audited provenance, agent-bridge autonomy fabric. Profile S (fully offline) or Profile L (opt-in cloud). BUSL.

title: pat-the-geek/be-clear
summary: Application de pilotage des interactions ORG/ENV/ENG/EVENT — FastAPI + React 19 + PostgreSQL

title: bedeberger/schreibwerkstatt
summary: KI-gestütztes Lektorat-Tool für BookStack

title: bleeeet/TermiPet
summary: 一个运行在 Claude Code 和终端旁的 macOS 桌面宠物助手，支持状态卡片、快捷指令、AI 用量查看和本地优先的宠物聊天。

title: ajwalsh08/def14a-parser
summary: Extract CEO compensation and governance data from SEC DEF 14A proxy statements via a local LLM (Ollama)

title: ashokramcse/olla-nest
summary: Company ready local AI workspace built on Ollama Auto Router, admin controls, RBAC, audit trail, reports & analytics. Self-hosted, no cloud, no data leaves your network.

title: Gakuseei/Aria
summary: 🌹 100% offline Chatbot. Custom characters, 13 languages, passion system. Powered by Ollama.

title: IBazylchuk/paparats-mcp
summary: Local‑first MCP server for multi‑repository semantic code search with Qdrant and Ollama. Turns your entire workspace into private context for AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Antigravity and Windsurf.

title: chf3198/megingjord-harness
summary: AI agent governance harness: baton workflow, fleet LLM routing (Ollama/Claude/OpenRouter), and CI gates for Copilot, Claude Code, and Codex.

title: CrispStrobe/CrispSorter
summary: AI-powered document organiser. Extracts text and/or sorts documents: Drop in a bunch of PDFs, DOCX files, or ebooks, and it extracts Document Text, identifies Title, Author, and Year, with a local or remote LLM, and moves them into folders, and/or keeps the extracted text.

title: MelonS/MelonS-Agents
summary: macOS multi-agent scaffold. Current mission: faceless short-form video (topic → 9:16 60s, $0 runtime, EN+KO). General-purpose: orchestrator + 4 subagents + 3-layer reactive audit + Tier-1/Tier-2 routing. More mission types planned.

title: macOS26/Agent
summary: Agent! Is a native macOS App that works with any LLM [local and cloud], [open source and paid] Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama, Qwen, Hugging Face, and 12 more. Writes code, builds Xcode projects, bump versions, manages git, automates Safari (AppleScript, JS, or Accessibility), extends via MCP servers. Accepts tasks from your iPhone via Messages. 🤯

title: JetBrains/koog
summary: Koog is a JVM (Java and Kotlin) framework for building predictable, fault-tolerant and enterprise-ready AI agents across all platforms – from backend services to Android and iOS, JVM, and even in-browser environments. Koog is based on our AI products expertise and provides proven solutions for complex LLM and AI problems

title: zzallirog/weighted-compact
summary: Trainable context-compaction substrate for Claude Code

title: sPROFFEs/Clade
summary: A terminal launcher for agent CLIs — Claude Code, Codex CLI, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, DeepSeek-TUI — that pairs each session with a self-contained template (mission, playbook, rules, tools, subagents, persona) and clones it into a fresh isolated chat every time you start working on something new.

title: Glad-Labs/poindexter
summary: Poindexter — open-source AI content pipeline that researches, writes, reviews, and publishes autonomously. Self-hosted on your machine. Built by Glad Labs LLC.

title: dejansaudi/AI_Orchestrator
summary: Private, local-first executive work orchestrator for macOS. Clarification-driven; runs local Ollama models overnight.

title: OneCielAI/claude-any
summary: Claude Code provider selector for Anthropic, Ollama, Ollama Cloud, vLLM, NVIDIA hosted, and self-hosted NIM

title: hydropix/TranslateBooksWithLLMs
summary: Translate full-length books and documents with Ollama, OpenAI (comptatible), Gemini, Mistral, Poe or OpenRouter. Preserves formatting. Resumes where you left off. No file size limits.
